/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/Bird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/BlackBird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/DynamicObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/Pig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/RedBird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/src/YellowBird.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RunUnitTests.dir/test_src/RunTests.cpp.o -o bin/RunUnitTests -F"/Volumes/The Library/angry-birds-clone-assignment-srguts/build/_deps/sfml-src/extlibs/libs-osx/Frameworks"  -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/The Library/angry-birds-clone-assignment-srguts/build/_deps/sfml-src/extlibs/libs-osx/Frameworks" lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a _deps/box2d-build/bin/libbox2d.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-audio.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-network.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a lib/libgtest.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon -framework freetype _deps/sfml-src/extlibs/libs-osx/Frameworks/OpenAL.framework/OpenAL -framework vorbisenc -framework vorbisfile -framework vorbis -framework ogg -framework FLAC _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lpthread
